revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
'''若宮稲荷神社'''（わかみやいなりじんじゃ）とは、[[神社]]の名称。
== 一覧 == * [[若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)]] - 青森県北津軽郡中泊町大字田茂木字若宮鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)]] - 島根県出雲市高松町鎮座。 * [[伊良林稲荷神社]]（若宮稲荷神社） - 長崎県長崎市伊良林鎮座。[[竹ン芸]]で知られる。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (ハワイ)]] - アメリカ合衆国ハワイ州ワイパフ鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:わかみやいなりしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''若宮稲荷神社'''（わかみやいなりじんじゃ）とは、[[神社]]の名称。

'''若宮稲荷神社'''（わかみやいなりじんじゃ）とは、[[神社]]の名称。
* [[若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)]] - 青森県下北郡風間浦村大字下風呂字湯の上鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)]] - 青森県北津軽郡中泊町大字田茂木字若宮鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)]] - 島根県出雲市高松町鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)]] - 長崎県長崎市伊良林鎮座。伊良林稲荷神社とも称し、[[竹ン芸]]で知られる。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (ハワイ)]] - アメリカ合衆国ハワイ州ワイパフ鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:わかみやいなりしんしや}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]][[Category:Original pages]]<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->[[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[ja:若宮稲荷神社]][[category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/若宮稲荷神社]]

'''Wakamiya Inari Shrine''' (若宮稲荷神社) is the name of several {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)}} - Located in Nakadomari, Kitatsugaru District, Aomori Prefecture, at Tamogi, Wakamiya. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)}} - Located in Izumo City, Shimane Prefecture, in Takamatsu Town. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)}} - Located in Nagasaki City, Nagasaki Prefecture, in Irabayashi. Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the {{ill|Taken-gei|ja|竹ン芸}} performance. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Hawaii)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (ハワイ)}} - Located in Waipahu, Hawaii, United States.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Inari Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Jinja (disambiguation)|ja|若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)}}

'''Wakamiya Inari Shrine''' (若宮稲荷神社) is the name of several {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)}} - Located in Nakadomari, Kitatsugaru District, Aomori Prefecture, at Tamogi, Wakamiya. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)}} - Located in Izumo City, Shimane Prefecture, in Takamatsu Town. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)}} - Located in Nagasaki City, Nagasaki Prefecture, in Irabayashi. Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the {{ill|Taken-gei|ja|竹ン芸}} performance. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (ハワイ)|en}} - Located in Waipahu, Hawaii, United States.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Inari Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine|ja|若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)}}
{{曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]]

revision.text:
'''若宮稲荷神社'''（わかみやいなりじんじゃ）とは、[[神社]]の名称。
* [[若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)]] - 青森県下北郡風間浦村大字下風呂字湯の上鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)]] - 青森県北津軽郡中泊町大字田茂木字若宮鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)]] - 島根県出雲市高松町鎮座。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)]] - 長崎県長崎市伊良林鎮座。伊良林稲荷神社とも称し、[[竹ン芸]]で知られる。 * [[若宮稲荷神社 (ハワイ)]] - アメリカ合衆国ハワイ州ワイパフ鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:わかみやいなりしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Wakamiya Inari Shrine''' (若宮稲荷神社) is the name of several [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]].

* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nakadomari, Kitatsugaru District, Aomori Prefecture, at Tamogi, Wakamiya.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Izumo City, Shimane Prefecture, in Takamatsu Town.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|qq=|1=Wakamiya Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116450100}} - Located in Nagasaki City, Nagasaki Prefecture, in Irabayashi. Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the [[:en:Takengei|Takengei]] performance.
* [[:en:Wakamiya Inari Shrine|Wakamiya Inari Shrine]] - Located in Waipahu, Hawaii, United States.

* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue.

Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the [[:en:Takengei|Takengei]] performance.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮稲荷神社]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q55525359]]
Wikidata name: 若宮稲荷神社
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Wakamiya Inari Shrine''' (若宮稲荷神社) is the name of several [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]].

* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nakadomari, Kitatsugaru District, Aomori Prefecture, at Tamogi, Wakamiya.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Izumo City, Shimane Prefecture, in Takamatsu Town.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|1=Wakamiya Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116450100}} - Located in Nagasaki City, Nagasaki Prefecture, in Irabayashi. Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the [[:en:Takengei|Takengei]] performance.
* [[:en:Wakamiya Inari Shrine|Wakamiya Inari Shrine]] - Located in Waipahu, Hawaii, United States.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Inari Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷神社}}
* {{ill|Wakamiya-sha|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮社|1=Wakamiya Sha (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616278}}
* {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine|ja|若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮神社}}

'''Wakamiya Inari Shrine''' (若宮稲荷神社) is the name of several [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]].

* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nakadomari, Kitatsugaru District, Aomori Prefecture, at Tamogi, Wakamiya.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Izumo City, Shimane Prefecture, in Takamatsu Town.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|1=Wakamiya Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116450100}} - Located in Nagasaki City, Nagasaki Prefecture, in Irabayashi. Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the [[:en:Takengei|Takengei]] performance.
* [[:en:Wakamiya Inari Shrine|Wakamiya Inari Shrine]] - Located in Waipahu, Hawaii, United States.

* {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (風間浦村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Kazamaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kazamaura, Shimokita District, Aomori Prefecture, at Shimonofuro, Yunoue. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (中泊町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nakadomari)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nakadomari, Kitatsugaru District, Aomori Prefecture, at Tamogi, Wakamiya. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (出雲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Izumo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Izumo City, Shimane Prefecture, in Takamatsu Town. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|若宮稲荷神社 (長崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Inari Shrine (Nagasaki)|1=Wakamiya Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q116450100}} - Located in Nagasaki City, Nagasaki Prefecture, in Irabayashi. Also known as Irabayashi Inari Shrine, it is renowned for the {{ill|Takengei|en|Takengei|WD=Q11598643|lt=Takengei}} performance. * {{ill|Wakamiya Inari Shrine|en|Wakamiya Inari Shrine|WD=Q7960795|lt=Wakamiya Inari Shrine}} - Located in Waipahu, Hawaii, United States. == See Also == * {{ill|Inari Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|稲荷神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷神社}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮社|1=Wakamiya Sha (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616278}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine|ja|若宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮神社}}
